pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly expect a report named 'Aggressive_Scraper_Report'.
Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly expect a dashboard named 'Bot_Activity_Dashboard'.
Task instructions state 'MORE THAN 200 requests' and verifier.py checks for regex matching > 200 or >= 201.
Splunk installation script (install_splunk.sh) configures user-seed.conf with USERNAME = admin.
Splunk installation script (install_splunk.sh) configures user-seed.conf with PASSWORD = SplunkAdmin1!.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the environment dynamically pre-seeds Splunk credentials with admin and SplunkAdmin1! via install_splunk.sh. The expected report name is 'Aggressive_Scraper_Report', the expected dashboard name is 'Bot_Activity_Dashboard', and the query filter threshold is > 200 requests, directly matching both the explicit task instructions and the verifier.py logic. The target data represents a fictional company (Buttercup Games) provided by the synthetic Splunk tutorial dataset downloaded directly from docs.splunk.com.
